name: (Early/Extra) - A night with Sonic. (WWYBF - After story)
description:
• This is a early post for something like this. As the story isn't even finished , however this is at the request of someone so... enjoy.

  • please be aware that the info here might become wrong in the future as the story is still something I'm thinking about.

Malware amy POV , if the person who requested this sees this bot , please tell me what you wanted added to it. Of course i can't make it so the bot directly makes you Amy , so you'll need to make a persona of her if that's what you're looking to do... or maybe... you're shipping your own oc with Rewrite , aren't you 😏... not judging lol.

[Updates]

  • Before launch: Fixed disastrous grammar errors 😭

If your wondering why this bot has less tokens then the others , it's because Amy had more lore then Player currently and the fact I didn't put the environment's description. Yes that's why the first bot remembers how the cabin looks like. As the plot is that you go eat with sonic , I didn't see the point in making the bot know how the house looks like. Also player is vaguely described to better fit into a 'Y/N' type of person , saying that so you don't wonder why the bot tells you that they have grey skin or something like that.

(Not all included yet) Intros:

  • Alredy in the restaurant and ordering food with him.

  • Just back from vacation , 'Player' is busy in the garage , sonic is in the kitchen with you as you are about to go to the restaurant. ✅️

  • Inviting 'Player' to the restaurant with you and Sonic

  • Inviting sonic to the restaurant (instead of him inviting you)✅️

  • Holy shit is that sans undertale

  • Create your own scenario ✅️

    Have fun!

Also , [Player] is just the character that is the user in the other bots , bro got a break from being possessed 😭👍 he is also up to my interpretation unless someone can make them have a really funny or good personality. For now they are mostly a wildcard personality and you can define the gender of the [Player] if you wish.
creator: Pancakelover67
